haveI : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime := inferInstance
  let σ := linearInvo k
  have h_sq : σ ^ 2 = 1 := linearInvo_sq k
  have h_inj : Function.Injective σ := by
    rw [injective_iff_hasLeftInverse]; use σ; intro; exact FunLike.congr_fun h_sq _
  let aux (P : S k → Prop) [DecidablePred P] (h : ∀ s, P s ↔ ¬ P (σ s)) :
      2 * Fintype.card {s // P s} = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let f : {s // P s} ⊕ {s // P s} → S k := fun x ↦ match x with
      | Sum.inl s => s
      | Sum.inr s => σ s
    have : Function.Bijective f := by
      constructor
      · rintro (a|a) (b|b) hab <;> simp [f] at hab
        · exact Subtype.ext hab
        · exfalso; have := (h _).1 a.2; rw [hab] at this; exact (h _).1 b.2 this
        · exfalso; have := (h _).1 b.2; rw [←hab] at this; exact (h _).1 a.2 this
        · exact Subtype.ext (h_inj hab)
      · intro s; by_cases hs : P s
        · exact ⟨Sum.inl ⟨s, hs⟩, rfl⟩
        · refine ⟨Sum.inr ⟨σ s, (h (σ s)).2 ?_⟩, ?_⟩
          · rwa [FunLike.congr_fun h_sq s]
          · simp [f, FunLike.congr_fun h_sq s]
    rw [← Fintype.card_sum, Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.ofBijective f this), two_mul]
  apply mul_left_cancel₀ (two_ne_zero : 2 ≠ 0)
  rw [aux (fun s ↦ s.1.2.2 > 0), aux (fun s ↦ s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 > 0)]
  · intro s; simp only [gt_iff_lt, not_lt]
    have : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h_eq, _, _⟩ := s
      simp only [hz, zero_pow, add_zero] at h_eq
      have : (4 * x * y) % 4 = (4 * k + 1) % 4 := by rw [h_eq]
      simp [Nat.mul_mod_right] at this; contradiction
    constructor <;> intro h <;> { simp [σ, linearInvo]; linarith }
  · intro s; simp only [gt_iff_lt, not_lt]
    have : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_zero; have h_z : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := by linarith
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h_eq, _, _⟩ := s; dsimp at h_z
      rw [h_z] at h_eq; have : (x+y)^2 = 4*k+1 := by linear_combination h_eq
      have : ((x+y).natAbs)^2 = 4*k+1 := by
        rw [← Int.natAbs_sq, ← sq, this]; norm_cast
      exact Nat.Prime.not_isSquare Fact.out ⟨(x+y).natAbs, this.symm⟩
    constructor <;> intro h <;> { simp [σ, linearInvo]; linarith }

      rw [Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.mk f g (by intro; simp [σ_sq]) (by intro; simp [σ_sq])), two_mul]
    rw [this, ← Fintype.card_sum, Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.sumCompl (· ∈ A))]
  apply mul_right_cancel₀ (G := ℕ) (by norm_num)

      rcases (Nat.dvd_prime hp).mp this with h1 | hp_eq
      · rw [h1] at this; simp at this; rw [this] at hp; exact Nat.not_prime_one hp
      · rw [hp_eq, sq] at this
        have : p = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_left (Nat.Prime.ne_zero hp) this.symm
        rw [this] at hp; exact Nat.not_prime_one hp

classical
  let f := linearInvo k
  have f_sq : f ∘ f = id := by ext; apply linearInvo_sq
  
  -- We show that for a predicate P, if P s ↔ ¬ P (f s), then card {s | P s} = card S / 2.
  let count (P : S k → Prop) := Fintype.card {s | P s}
  have half (P : S k → Prop) (h : ∀ s, P s ↔ ¬ P (f s)) : 2 * count P = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let A := {s | P s}; let B := {s | ¬ P s}
    have : Fintype.card A + Fintype.card B = Fintype.card (S k) := Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_not _
    have : Fintype.card A = Fintype.card B := Fintype.card_congr {
        toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨f s, (h s).mp hs⟩,
        invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨f s, (h (f s)).mpr (by simp only [f] at hs; rwa [← Function.comp_apply (f := f), f_sq, id_eq])⟩,
        left_inv := fun _ => Subtype.eq (congr_fun f_sq _),
        right_inv := fun _ => Subtype.eq (congr_fun f_sq _)
      }
    rw [← this] at *; linarith

  -- Predicate for T: z > 0
  let P_T (s : S k) := s.1.2.2 > 0
  have neg_T (s : S k) : P_T s ↔ ¬ P_T (f s) := by
    simp [P_T, f, linearInvo]
    have : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; simp [h] at s; rcases s.2 with ⟨h_eq, _⟩
      have : (4 * k + 1) % 4 = 1 := by norm_num
      rw [← h_eq] at this
      simp at this
    exact Int.lt_asymm_iff this

  -- Predicate for U: x - y + z > 0
  let P_U (s : S k) := s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 > 0
  have neg_U (s : S k) : P_U s ↔ ¬ P_U (f s) := by
    simp [P_U, f, linearInvo]
    rw [← neg_lt_zero]; congr 1; ring_nf
    have : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; have h_z : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := by linarith
      have h_eq := s.2.1; rw [h_z] at h_eq; ring_nf at h_eq
      have h_sq : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by linear_combination h_eq
      have h_nat : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
        zify [sq] at h_sq ⊢; exact h_sq
      have hp := hk.out
      have : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs ∣ 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← h_nat]; exact dvd_pow_self _ (by norm_num)
      rcases (Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_one_or_self hp).mp this with h1 | h1
      · rw [h1] at h_nat; simp at h_nat; rw [h_nat] at hp; exact Nat.not_prime_one hp
      · rw [h1, sq] at h_nat; have := Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left hp.pos h_nat; rw [this] at hp; exact Nat.not_prime_one hp
    exact Int.lt_asymm_iff this

  have hT := half P_T neg_T
  have hU := half P_U neg_U
  rw [← hU] at hT
  exact Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (by norm_num) hT

let σ := linearInvo k
  have σ_sq : σ ∘ σ = id := by funext; apply linearInvo_sq
  
  have z_ne_0 : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ hz
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
    simp [hz] at h
    apply_fun (· % 4) at h
    simp [Int.add_emod] at h

  have xyz_ne_0 : ∀ s : S k, s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ h_eq
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
    have : z = y - x := eq_sub_of_add_eq h_eq
    rw [this] at h
    have eq : (4 : ℤ) * k + 1 = (x + y) ^ 2 := by rw [← h.1]; ring
    have hp : (4 * k + 1).Prime := (inferInstance : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime).1
    have : 0 ≤ x + y := add_nonneg (le_of_lt h.2.1) (le_of_lt h.2.2)
    let n := (x + y).natAbs
    have hn : (n : ℤ) = x + y := Int.natAbs_of_nonneg this
    rw [← hn] at eq
    norm_cast at eq
    refine hp.not_dvd_one ⟨n, ?_⟩
    rw [mul_comm, ← sq, ← eq, one_mul]

  let T_neg : Set (S k) := {s | s.1.2.2 < 0}
  let U_neg : Set (S k) := {s | s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 < 0}

  have card_T : Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card T_neg := 
    Fintype.card_congr <| Equiv.mk 
      (fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨σ s, by simp [T, linearInvo] at hs ⊢; linarith⟩)
      (fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨σ s, by simp [T_neg, linearInvo] at hs ⊢; linarith⟩)
      (fun _ => Subtype.eq <| congr_fun σ_sq _)
      (fun _ => Subtype.eq <| congr_fun σ_sq _)

  have card_U : Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card U_neg :=
    Fintype.card_congr <| Equiv.mk 
      (fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨σ s, by simp [U, linearInvo] at hs ⊢; linarith⟩)
      (fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨σ s, by simp [U_neg, linearInvo] at hs ⊢; linarith⟩)
      (fun _ => Subtype.eq <| congr_fun σ_sq _)
      (fun _ => Subtype.eq <| congr_fun σ_sq _)

  have double_T : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [card_T, mul_two, ← Fintype.card_subtype_compl, add_comm]
    apply congr_arg₂ _ rfl
    apply Fintype.card_congr
    refine Equiv.subtypeEquivRight (fun s => ?_)
    simp [T_neg, not_lt]
    constructor <;> intro h
    · exact lt_of_le_of_ne h (z_ne_0 s)
    · exact le_of_lt h

  have double_U : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [card_U, mul_two, ← Fintype.card_subtype_compl, add_comm]
    apply congr_arg₂ _ rfl
    apply Fintype.card_congr
    refine Equiv.subtypeEquivRight (fun s => ?_)
    simp [U_neg, not_lt]
    constructor <;> intro h
    · exact lt_of_le_of_ne h (xyz_ne_0 s)
    · exact le_of_lt h

  rw [← double_T] at double_U
  exact Nat.mul_left_cancel (by norm_num) double_U

let f := linearInvo k
  have hf_sq : f ^ 2 = 1 := linearInvo_sq k

  have z_ne_zero : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ hz => by
    simp [S] at h; rw [hz] at h
    apply_fun (· % 4) at h.1; simp at h

  have val_ne_zero : ∀ s : S k, s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ hv => by
    simp [S] at h
    have : (x + y) ^ 2 = (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) := by linear_combination h.1 - (x + y + z) * hv
    apply_fun Int.natAbs at this; simp at this
    have hp : (4 * k + 1).Prime := (inferInstance : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime).1
    obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := hp.dvd_of_dvd_pow (Dvd.intro _ (by rw [this, one_mul]))
    rw [hm] at this
    have : 4 * k + 1 = 0 := by nlinarith [hp.two_le]
    simp [this] at hp; exact Nat.not_prime_zero hp

  have split : ∀ (P : S k → Prop) [DecidablePred P], (∀ s, P s ↔ ¬ P (f s)) →
      2 * Fintype.card {s // P s} = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    intro P _ h_neg
    let g : {s // P s} ⊕ {s // P s} → S k := fun | .inl s => s | .inr s => f s
    apply Fintype.card_of_bijective g
    · intro a b hab; cases a <;> cases b <;> simp at hab
      · exact hab
      · rw [← hab] at h_neg; exact ((h_neg _).1 (Subtype.prop _)).elim
      · rw [hab] at h_neg; exact ((h_neg _).1 (Subtype.prop _)).elim
      · apply_fun f at hab; simp [hf_sq] at hab; exact hab
    · intro s; by_cases hs : P s
      · exact ⟨.inl ⟨s, hs⟩, rfl⟩
      · exact ⟨.inr ⟨f s, by rwa [h_neg]⟩, by simp [hf_sq]⟩

  have hT := split (fun s => s.1.2.2 > 0) (fun s => by
    have := z_ne_zero s; dsimp [f, linearInvo]; rw [← not_lt]
    rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne this with h | h <;> simp [h] <;> linarith)

  have hU := split (fun s => s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 > 0) (fun s => by
    have := val_ne_zero s; dsimp [f, linearInvo]; rw [← not_lt]
    rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne this with h | h <;> simp [h] <;> linarith)

  rw [← hT] at hU
  exact mul_left_cancel₀ two_ne_zero hU

have hp : (4 * k + 1).Prime := Fact.out
  let σ := linearInvo k
  have h_sigma_inv : ∀ s, σ (σ s) = s := fun s ↦ congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s

  let half_card (A : Set (S k)) [Fintype A] [Fintype (Aᶜ : Set (S k))]
      (hA : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ σ s ∉ A) : 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let f : A → Aᶜ := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (hA s).mp hs⟩
    let g : Aᶜ → A := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (hA s).mpr hs⟩
    have : Fintype.card A = Fintype.card Aᶜ := Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.mk f g
      (fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (h_sigma_inv _)) (fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (h_sigma_inv _)))
    rw [← Fintype.card_compl_set A, ← this, two_mul]

  have hT : ∀ s, s ∈ T k ↔ σ s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩
    simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo]
    dsimp
    have hz : z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz
      simp [hz] at h
      have : 4 * x * y = 4 * k + 1 := h.1
      have : (4 * x * y) % 4 = (4 * k + 1) % 4 := congr_arg (· % 4) this
      simp at this
    constructor
    · intro hz_pos; simp; linarith
    · intro hz_neg; simp at hz_neg; linarith [Int.lt_or_gt_of_ne hz]

  have hU : ∀ s, s ∈ U k ↔ σ s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩
    simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo]
    dsimp
    let v := x - y + z
    have hv : v ≠ 0 := by
      intro hv
      have : z = y - x := by linarith
      have heq : 4 * x * y + (y - x) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [this] at h; exact h.1
      ring_nf at heq
      have : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by linear_combination heq
      apply_fun Int.natAbs at this
      rw [Int.natAbs_pow_two, Int.natAbs_ofNat] at this
      have ha : 4 * k + 1 ∣ (Int.natAbs (x + y)) ^ 2 := by rw [this]; exact dvd_rfl
      have : 4 * k + 1 ∣ Int.natAbs (x + y) := hp.dvd_of_dvd_pow ha
      obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := this
      rw [hb, mul_pow] at this
      have : (4 * k + 1) * ((4 * k + 1) * b ^ 2) = (4 * k + 1) * 1 := by
        rw [← this, mul_comm, mul_assoc]
      have : (4 * k + 1) * b ^ 2 = 1 := Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left hp.pos this
      have : 4 * k + 1 = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right this
      linarith [hp.one_lt]
    constructor
    · intro _; simp; linarith
    · intro h_neg; simp at h_neg ⊢; linarith [Int.lt_or_gt_of_ne hv]

  have h1 := half_card (T k) hT
  have h2 := half_card (U k) hU
  rw [←h1] at h2
  linarith

let σ := linearInvo k
  have hσ : ∀ s, σ (σ s) = s := λ s ↦ by rw [← Function.comp_apply (f:=σ), linearInvo_sq]; rfl
  
  have z_ne_0 (s : S k) : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := λ h ↦ by
    have := s.2.1; rw [h] at this; simp at this
    apply_fun (· % 4) at this; simp [Int.add_emod] at this

  have poly_ne_0 (s : S k) : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := λ h ↦ by
    have h_eq := s.2.1; have hz : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := by linarith
    rw [hz] at h_eq; ring_nf at h_eq
    have : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1)^2 = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith
    have : (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) = ((s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs : ℤ) ^ 2 := by
      rw [← Int.coe_nat_pow, Int.natAbs_sq, ← this]
    norm_cast at this
    have prime_not_sq {p n : ℕ} (hp : p.Prime) (h : p = n ^ 2) : False := by
      by_cases hn : n = 0; simp [hn] at h; exact hp.ne_zero h
      have : n ∣ p := by rw [h]; exact dvd_mul_left n n
      rcases (Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_eq_one_or_eq_self hp).mp this with rfl | rfl
      · simp at h; exact hp.ne_one h
      · nth_rw 1 [← pow_one p] at h; simp at h; exact hp.ne_one h
    exact prime_not_sq hk.out this.symm

  let half (P : S k → Prop) [DecidablePred P] 
      (h_flip : ∀ s, P s ↔ ¬ P (σ s)) : 2 * (Finset.univ.filter P).card = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let S_P := Finset.univ.filter P
    let S_notP := Finset.univ.filter (λ s ↦ ¬ P s)
    have h_union : Finset.univ = S_P ∪ S_notP := by ext; simp; tauto
    have h_disj : Disjoint S_P S_notP := by rw [Finset.disjoint_filter_filter]; simp
    have h_bij : S_P.map ⟨σ, Function.Bijective.of_involutive (linearInvo_sq k) |>.1⟩ = S_notP := by
      ext s; simp; rw [← h_flip]; constructor
      · rintro ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩; exact ha
      · intro hs; use σ s; rw [hσ]; exact ⟨hs, rfl⟩
    rw [h_union, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint h_disj, ← h_bij, Finset.card_map, two_mul]

  have card_T : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    convert half (λ s ↦ s.1.2.2 > 0) (λ s ↦ by
      have : (σ s).1.2.2 = -s.1.2.2 := rfl
      rw [this]; have := z_ne_0 s; linarith)
    rw [Fintype.card_of_subtype]

  have card_U : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    convert half (λ s ↦ s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 > 0) (λ s ↦ by
      have : (σ s).1.1 - (σ s).1.2.1 + (σ s).1.2.2 = -(s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2) := by 
        simp [σ, linearInvo]; ring
      rw [this]; have := poly_ne_0 s; linarith)
    rw [Fintype.card_of_subtype]
    
  linarith

let σ := linearInvo k
  let half_card (A : Set (S k)) [Fintype A] [Fintype (Aᶜ : Set (S k))]
      (h : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ σ s ∉ A) : 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let Ac := (Aᶜ : Set (S k))
    have : Fintype.card A = Fintype.card Ac := Fintype.card_congr ⟨
      fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (h s).mp hs⟩, fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (h s).mpr hs⟩,
      fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) _),
      fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) _)⟩
    rw [← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.Set.sumCompl A), Fintype.card_sum, this, two_mul]
  have z_ne_zero : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ hz ↦ by
    simp [S, hz] at h; have := h.1.symm; rw [mul_assoc] at this
    norm_num [Int.add_mod] at this
  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply half_card (T k); intro s; simp [T, linearInvo]
    have := z_ne_zero s; rcases lt_trichotomy s.1.2.2 0 with h|h|h <;> try linarith
    contradiction
  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply half_card (U k); intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [U, linearInvo]; rw [← not_iff_not]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; have : y = x + z := by linarith
      simp [S] at h; have eq : 4 * k + 1 = (2 * x + z) ^ 2 := by rw [h.1, this]; ring
      have p : (4 * k + 1).Prime := (inferInstance : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime).out
      have : (2 * x + z).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by zify [eq]; exact eq.symm
      rcases (Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_one_or_self p ⟨_, this⟩) with (h1 | h1)
      · rw [h1] at this; simp at this; linarith [Nat.Prime.one_lt p]
      · rw [h1, sq] at this; cases (Nat.mul_eq_self_iff_eq_one).mp this.symm
        · exact Nat.Prime.ne_one p ‹_›
        · simp at h1; rw [h1] at p; exact Nat.Prime.ne_zero p ‹_›
    constructor <;> intro <;> linarith
  linarith

let σ := linearInvo k
  have σ_inv : ∀ s, σ (σ s) = s := fun s ↦ congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s
  have z_ne_0 : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun s ↦ by
    intro h
    have := s.2.1; rw [h] at this; simp at this
    apply_fun (· % 4) at this; norm_num at this

  have u_ne_0 : ∀ s : S k, s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun s ↦ by
    intro h
    have h_eq := s.2.1
    have : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := by linarith
    rw [this] at h_eq
    have : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by linear_combination h_eq
    lift (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) to ℕ using (by linarith [s.2.2.1, s.2.2.2]) with n hn
    rw [hn] at this; norm_cast at this
    have hp : (4 * k + 1).Prime := Fact.out
    cases hp.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd n ⟨n, this.symm⟩ with
    | inl h => rw [h] at this; simp at this
    | inr h => rw [h] at this; apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (Nat.Prime.pos hp) at this; rw [this] at h; simp at h; exact Nat.Prime.ne_one hp h

  have logic : ∀ A : Set (S k), [Fintype A] → (∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ σ s ∉ A) → 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    intro A _ h
    rw [mul_comm, ← Fintype.card_sum, Fintype.card_congr]
    fapply Equiv.mk
    · rintro (a | a); exact a; exact σ a
    · intro s
      if hs : s ∈ A then Sum.inl ⟨s, hs⟩ else Sum.inr ⟨σ s, (h (σ s)).mpr (by rwa [σ_inv])⟩
    · rintro (a|a) <;> simp [σ_inv]
      · split_ifs; rfl; contradiction
      · split_ifs; have := a.2; rw [h] at this; contradiction; rfl
    · intro s; split_ifs <;> simp [σ_inv]

  apply Nat.mul_right_cancel (n := 2) (by norm_num)
  rw [logic (U k) (by intro s; simp [U, σ, linearInvo]; have := u_ne_0 s; linarith),
      logic (T k) (by intro s; simp [T, σ, linearInvo]; have := z_ne_0 s; linarith)]

let i := linearInvo k
  have half_S (P : S k → Prop) (h_flip : ∀ s, P s ↔ ¬ P (i s)) :
      2 * Fintype.card {s | P s} = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let A := {s | P s}; let B := {s | ¬ P s}
    have : A ≃ B := ⟨fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨i s, (h_flip s).1 hs⟩, fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨i s, (h_flip s).2 hs⟩,
      fun _ ↦ Subtype.eq (linearInvo_sq k _), fun _ ↦ Subtype.eq (linearInvo_sq k _)⟩
    rw [mul_comm, two_mul, ← Fintype.card_congr this]
    convert (Fintype.card_subtype_compl {s | P s}).symm
    ext; simp [B]
  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    refine half_S (fun s ↦ s.1.2.2 > 0) (fun s ↦ ?_)
    rcases s with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩
    simp [i, linearInvo]; rw [lt_trichotomy z 0]
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; apply linearInvo_no_fixedPoints k; use ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩
      simp [linearInvo, hz]; ext <;> simp [*]; linarith
    simp [this]; tauto
  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    refine half_S (fun s ↦ s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 > 0) (fun s ↦ ?_)
    rcases s with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩
    simp [i, linearInvo]; rw [lt_trichotomy (x - y + z) 0]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; simp [S] at hS
      have : (x + y)^2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [sub_eq_neg_self] at h; rw [←h] at hS; nlinarith
      have hxy : (x + y).natAbs ∣ 4 * k + 1 := Int.natAbs_dvd_natAbs.2 ⟨_, this.symm⟩
      cases Nat.Prime.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd hk.out (x + y).natAbs hxy with
      | inl h => simp at h; linarith [hS.2.1, hS.2.2]
      | inr h =>
          rw [Int.natAbs_of_nonneg (by linarith [hS.2.1, hS.2.2])] at h
          rw [h] at this; have : 4 * k + 1 = 1 := by nlinarith
          rw [this] at hk; norm_num at hk
    simp [this]; tauto
  rw [←hT] at hU; linarith

let σ := linearInvo k
  have σ_sq : ∀ s, σ (σ s) = s := fun s ↦ by rw [← Function.comp_apply (f := σ), ← linearInvo_sq k]; rfl
  let half_S (A : Set (S k)) (f : S k → ℤ) 
      (hA : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ f s > 0)
      (h_neg : ∀ s, f (σ s) = - f s)
      (h_nz : ∀ s, f s ≠ 0) : 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let Ac := {s : S k | s ∉ A}
    have h_bij : A ≃ Ac := Equiv.mk 
      (fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, by 
        simp only [Ac, Set.mem_setOf_eq, hA] at hs ⊢
        rw [h_neg, neg_pos] at hs
        linarith⟩)
      (fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, by 
        simp only [Ac, Set.mem_setOf_eq, hA] at hs ⊢
        rw [not_lt] at hs
        rw [h_neg]
        have : f s ≠ 0 := h_nz s
        linarith⟩)
      (fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (σ_sq _))
      (fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (σ_sq _))
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_compl, Fintype.card_congr h_bij, two_mul]
  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply half_S (T k) (fun s ↦ s.1.2.2) (fun _ ↦ Iff.rfl) (fun _ ↦ rfl)
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, _, _⟩ rfl
    simp only [zero_pow, add_zero, ne_eq] at h
    have : (4 * x * y) % 2 = (4 * k + 1) % 2 := by rw [h]
    simp at this
  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply half_S (U k) (fun s ↦ s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2) (fun _ ↦ Iff.rfl) (by
      intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, _⟩; simp [σ, linearInvo]; ring)
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, hx, hy⟩ hz
    have : z = y - x := by linarith
    rw [this] at h
    have : (x + y) ^ 2 = ((4 * k + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) := by linarith
    lift (x + y) to ℕ using by linarith with n hn
    rw [hn] at this
    norm_cast at this
    have hp : (4 * k + 1).Prime := hk.out
    have : n ∣ 4 * k + 1 := ⟨n, this⟩
    rcases (Nat.dvd_prime hp).mp this with rfl | rfl
    · have : 4 * k + 1 ≥ 2 := Nat.Prime.two_le hp
      linarith
    · nth_rw 1 [← pow_one (4 * k + 1)] at this
      have := (pow_eq_pow_iff_eq_right (by linarith) (by norm_num)).mp this
      have : 4 * k + 1 ≥ 2 := Nat.Prime.two_le hp
      linarith
  linarith

let σ := linearInvo k
  have h_half : ∀ (P : S k → Prop) [DecidablePred P],
      (∀ s, P (σ s) ↔ ¬ P s) → 2 * Fintype.card {s | P s} = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    intro P _ h
    let A := {s | P s}
    let B := {s | ¬ P s}
    have : Fintype.card A = Fintype.card B := Fintype.card_congr
      ⟨fun a ↦ ⟨σ a.1, (h a.1).mpr a.2⟩, fun b ↦ ⟨σ b.1, (h (σ b.1)).mp (by rw [linearInvo_sq]; exact b.2)⟩,
       fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) _), fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) _)⟩
    rw [← this, two_mul, ← Fintype.card_sum, Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.sumCompl P)]

  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply h_half (fun s ↦ s.1.2.2 > 0)
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩
    simp [σ, linearInvo, T]; intro
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; rw [hz] at h; simp at h
      obtain ⟨h, _, _⟩ := h
      apply_fun (· % 4) at h
      simp [mul_assoc, Int.add_emod] at h
    linarith

  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply h_half (fun s ↦ s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 > 0)
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩
    simp [σ, linearInvo, U]; intro
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; have hz : z = y - x := by linarith
      have h_eqn := h.1; rw [hz] at h_eqn
      have : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith
      lift x to ℕ using (S_lower_bound k ⟨_, h⟩).1.le
      lift y to ℕ using (S_lower_bound k ⟨_, h⟩).2.le
      norm_cast at this
      have hp : (4 * k + 1).Prime := Fact.out
      have h_div : (x + y) ∣ (4 * k + 1) := ⟨(x + y), this.symm⟩
      cases Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_eq hp h_div with
      | inl h1 =>
        exfalso
        have : x ≥ 1 := by exact (S_lower_bound k ⟨_, h⟩).1
        have : y ≥ 1 := by exact (S_lower_bound k ⟨_, h⟩).2
        linarith
      | inr h2 =>
        rw [h2] at this
        have : 4 * k + 1 = 1 := by
           nth_rewrite 1 [← pow_one (4 * k + 1)] at this
           exact Nat.pow_left_inj (by norm_num) (by nlinarith) this
        simp at this; exact Nat.Prime.ne_one hp this
    linarith

  linarith

let σ := linearInvo k
  have hσ : ∀ s, σ (σ s) = s := fun s ↦ by rcases s with ⟨⟨x,y,z⟩, h⟩; simp [σ, linearInvo]
  
  let half_S (P : S k → Prop) (h_flip : ∀ s, P (σ s) ↔ ¬ P s) : 
      2 * Fintype.card {s // P s} = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    classical
    let A := {s // P s}
    let B := {s // ¬ P s}
    have iso : A ≃ B := {
      toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (h_flip s).mp hs⟩,
      invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (h_flip s).mpr hs⟩,
      left_inv := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ Subtype.ext (hσ s),
      right_inv := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ Subtype.ext (hσ s)
    }
    trans Fintype.card A + Fintype.card B
    · rw [Fintype.card_congr iso, two_mul]
    · rw [← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.sumCompl P), Fintype.card_sum]

  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply half_S (fun s ↦ s.1.2.2 > 0)
    intro s
    simp [σ, linearInvo]
    have : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      have := s.2.1
      rw [h] at this
      simp at this
      have : (4 * k + 1) % 4 = 0 := by rw [←this]; simp [Nat.mul_mod]
      norm_num at this
    rw [neg_pos, lt_iff_not_le]
    exact ⟨fun h ↦ not_le_of_lt h, fun h ↦ (not_le.mp h)⟩

  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply half_S (fun s ↦ s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 > 0)
    intro s
    simp [σ, linearInvo]
    have : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      have z_eq : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := by linarith
      have eq := s.2.1
      rw [z_eq] at eq
      have : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1)^2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [←eq]; ring
      have hp : Nat.Prime (4 * k + 1) := Fact.out
      let n := (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs
      have hn : n ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
        rw [←this]
        have : 0 ≤ s.1.1 + s.1.2.1 := by have := s.2.2; linarith
        simp [n, this]
      have : n ∣ 4 * k + 1 := by rw [←hn]; exact dvd_pow_self _ (by norm_num)
      cases (Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_one_or_self hp).mp this with
      | inl h => rw [h] at hn; norm_num at hn
      | inr h => 
        rw [h, pow_two] at hn
        have : 4 * k + 1 = 1 := mul_left_cancel₀ (Nat.Prime.ne_zero hp) hn
        rw [this] at hp; norm_num at hp
    rw [neg_pos, lt_iff_not_le]
    exact ⟨fun h ↦ not_le_of_lt h, fun h ↦ (not_le.mp h)⟩

  rw [hT] at hU
  exact Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (by norm_num) hU

have : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime := inferInstance
  let σ := linearInvo k
  have hσ : Function.Involutive σ := fun s ↦ congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s
  have h_z_ne_0 : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro s h
    have := linearInvo_no_fixedPoints k
    simp only [IsEmpty, fixedPoints, mem_setOf_eq, IsFixedPt, Subtype.forall] at this
    specialize this s.1.1 s.1.2.1 s.1.2.2 s.2
    simp [linearInvo, h] at this
  have h_T : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let T_pos := (Finset.univ : Finset (S k)).filter (fun s ↦ 0 < s.1.2.2)
    let T_neg := (Finset.univ : Finset (S k)).filter (fun s ↦ s.1.2.2 < 0)
    have h_union : Finset.univ = T_pos ∪ T_neg := by
      ext s; simp; rcases lt_trichotomy s.1.2.2 0 with h|h|h
      · right; exact h
      · exfalso; exact h_z_ne_0 s h
      · left; exact h
    have h_disj : Disjoint T_pos T_neg := by
      rw [Finset.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]; ext s; simp; linarith
    rw [h_union, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint h_disj]
    have h_eq : T_pos.card = T_neg.card := by
      apply Finset.card_bij (fun s _ ↦ σ s)
      · intro s hs; simp at hs ⊢; simp [linearInvo]; exact hs
      · intro s1 s2 _ _ h; exact hσ.injective h
      · intro s hs; use σ s; simp at hs ⊢; constructor
        · simp [linearInvo]; exact hs
        · exact hσ s
    have h_card : Fintype.card (T k) = T_pos.card := Fintype.card_of_subtype _ (by simp)
    rw [h_card, h_eq, two_mul]
  have h_U : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    have h_val_ne_0 : ∀ s : S k, (s.1.1 - s.1.2.1) + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
      intro ⟨⟨x,y,z⟩, hS⟩ h_eq
      have : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime := inferInstance
      simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hS
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at h_eq
      have h_sq : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
        rw [eq_sub_of_add_eq h_eq] at hS
        apply Int.eq_of_sub_eq_zero
        ring_nf; rw [sub_eq_add_neg, hS.1]; ring
      exact Nat.Prime.not_sq this.out (x + y).natAbs (by rw [←Int.natAbs_sq, h_sq]; norm_cast)
    let U_pos := (Finset.univ : Finset (S k)).filter (fun s ↦ (s.1.1 - s.1.2.1) + s.1.2.2 > 0)
    let U_neg := (Finset.univ : Finset (S k)).filter (fun s ↦ (s.1.1 - s.1.2.1) + s.1.2.2 < 0)
    have h_union : Finset.univ = U_pos ∪ U_neg := by
      ext s; simp; rcases lt_trichotomy ((s.1.1 - s.1.2.1) + s.1.2.2) 0 with h|h|h
      · right; exact h
      · exfalso; exact h_val_ne_0 s h
      · left; exact h
    have h_disj : Disjoint U_pos U_neg := by
      rw [Finset.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]; ext s; simp; linarith
    rw [h_union, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint h_disj]
    have h_eq : U_pos.card = U_neg.card := by
      apply Finset.card_bij (fun s _ ↦ σ s)
      · intro s hs; simp at hs ⊢; simp [linearInvo]; linarith
      · intro s1 s2 _ _ h; exact hσ.injective h
      · intro s hs; use σ s; simp at hs ⊢; constructor
        · simp [linearInvo]; linarith
        · exact hσ s
    have h_card : Fintype.card (U k) = U_pos.card := Fintype.card_of_subtype _ (by simp)
    rw [h_card, h_eq, two_mul]
  linarith

let i := linearInvo k
  have hi : Bijective i := ⟨LeftInverse.injective (linearInvo_sq k), RightInverse.surjective (linearInvo_sq k)⟩
  have h_not_sq : ∀ x : ℤ, x ^ 2 ≠ 4 * k + 1 := fun x h ↦
    Nat.Prime.not_sq hk.out ⟨x.natAbs, by simpa using h⟩
  have half_card (A : Set (S k)) (hA : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ i s ∉ A) : Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) / 2 := by
    have : 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
      have : (Aᶜ : Set (S k)) = i '' A := Set.ext fun s ↦ by
        rw [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_compl_iff, hA, not_not]
        exact ⟨fun h ↦ ⟨i s, h, by simp [i, linearInvo_sq]⟩, fun ⟨a, ha, eq⟩ ↦ eq ▸ ha⟩
      rw [← Fintype.card_compl_add_card A, this, Set.card_image_of_injective _ hi.1, two_mul]
    rw [← this, Nat.mul_div_right _ (by norm_num)]
  rw [half_card (U k), half_card (T k)]
  · rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [T, i, linearInvo, S] at h ⊢
    have : z ≠ 0 := fun hz ↦ h_not_sq 0 (by simp [hz] at h; linarith)
    linarith
  · rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [U, i, linearInvo, S] at h ⊢
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := fun e ↦ h_not_sq (x + y) <| by
      rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add, add_comm] at e; have eq := h.1; rw [e] at eq; rw [← eq]; ring
    linarith

let σ := linearInvo k
  have hσ : ∀ x, σ (σ x) = x := fun x ↦ congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) x
  have h_ne_zero : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro s h
    have : (4 * s.1.1 * s.1.2.1) % 2 = (4 * k + 1) % 2 := by rw [s.2.1, h, zero_pow]; norm_num
    norm_num at this
  have half_card (A : Set (S k)) [Fintype A] (hA : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ σ s ∉ A) :
      2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let f : A → {s : S k // s ∉ A} := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (hA s).1 hs⟩
    have hf : Function.Bijective f := by
      constructor
      · intro x y h; apply Subtype.ext; apply_fun (fun s ↦ (s : S k)) at h
        dsimp at h; apply_fun σ at h; simp [hσ] at h; exact h
      · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
        refine ⟨⟨σ y, (hA (σ y)).2 hy⟩, Subtype.ext (hσ y)⟩
    rw [mul_two, ← Fintype.card_subtype_compl, ← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.ofBijective f hf)]
  apply mul_right_cancel₀ (by norm_num : 2 ≠ 0)
  rw [half_card (U k), half_card (T k)]
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩
    simp [T, σ, linearInvo]; dsimp
    rw [lt_iff_le_and_ne]
    simp [h_ne_zero ⟨_, h⟩]
    linarith
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩
    simp [U, σ, linearInvo]; dsimp
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro heq
      have : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
        linear_combination h.1 + (x + y + z) * heq
      have : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
        apply Int.ofNat.inj
        rw [Int.ofNat_pow, Int.natAbs_sq, this]
      have hp : Nat.Prime (4 * k + 1) := hk.out
      by_cases hn : (x + y).natAbs = 0
      · rw [hn, zero_pow (by norm_num)] at this; linarith
      · have : (x + y).natAbs ∣ (4 * k + 1) := ⟨(x + y).natAbs, this⟩
        rcases (Nat.prime_def_lt'.mp hp).2 _ this with h1 | h2
        · rw [h1, one_pow] at this; linarith
        · rw [h2] at this
          have : 4 * k + 1 = 1 := by
             have : (4 * k + 1) * (4 * k + 1) = (4 * k + 1) * 1 := by rw [← this]; ring
             exact Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (by linarith) this
          linarith
    rw [lt_iff_le_and_ne]
    constructor <;> intro <;> linarith

have z_ne_zero (s : S k) : (s : ℤ × ℤ × ℤ).2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h
    rcases s with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hS
    dsimp at h
    rw [h, zero_pow two, add_zero] at hS
    have odd_p : (4 * k + 1) % 2 = 1 := by
      rw [add_comm, mul_comm, Int.add_mul_emod_self]
      rfl
    rw [← hS.1, mul_assoc, Int.mul_emod_right] at odd_p
    norm_num at odd_p

  have val_ne_zero (s : S k) : (s : ℤ × ℤ × ℤ).1 - (s : ℤ × ℤ × ℤ).2.1 + (s : ℤ × ℤ × ℤ).2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h
    rcases s with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hS
    dsimp at h
    have z_eq : z = y - x := eq_sub_of_add_eq h
    rw [z_eq] at hS
    have sq_eq : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by linear_combination hS.1
    have p_prime : (4 * k + 1).Prime := hk.out
    have sq_nat : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      norm_cast at sq_eq
      rwa [Int.natAbs_sq]
    have dvd_p : (x + y).natAbs ∣ 4 * k + 1 := ⟨(x + y).natAbs, sq_nat⟩
    rcases (Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_eq p_prime (Nat.ne_of_gt (Int.natAbs_pos_of_ne_zero (by linarith)))).mp dvd_p with rfl | h_eq
    · rw [← sq_nat] at p_prime
      norm_num at p_prime
    · rw [h_eq] at sq_nat
      have : 4 * k + 1 = 1 := by
        nth_rewrite 1 [← sq_nat]
        apply Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_right
        rw [mul_comm] at p_prime
        apply Nat.Prime.ne_zero p_prime
      rw [this] at p_prime
      exact Nat.not_prime_one p_prime

  let half_S (A : Set (S k)) [Fintype A] (h_flip : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ linearInvo k s ∉ A) :
      2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let A' := {s : S k | s ∉ A}
    have : Fintype A' := Fintype.ofFinite A'
    have bij : A ≃ A' := {
      toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨linearInvo k s, (h_flip s).mp hs⟩
      invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨linearInvo k s, (h_flip s).not.mp hs⟩
      left_inv := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ Subtype.ext (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s)
      right_inv := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ Subtype.ext (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s)
    }
    rw [← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.Set.sumCompl A), Fintype.card_sum, Fintype.card_congr bij, two_mul]

  have card_T : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply half_S; intro s
    simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo, Subtype.coe_mk]
    rcases s with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, _⟩; dsimp
    have := z_ne_zero s; dsimp at this
    lt_or_gt_of_ne this |>.casesOn
      (fun h => iff_of_false (not_lt_of_lt h) (neg_pos.mpr h))
      (fun h => iff_of_true h (not_lt_of_ge (le_of_lt (neg_neg_of_pos h))))

  have card_U : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply half_S; intro s
    simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo, Subtype.coe_mk]
    rcases s with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, _⟩; dsimp
    have := val_ne_zero s; dsimp at this
    have : -(y - x - z) = x - y + z := by ring
    rw [← this, neg_pos]
    have v_ne : y - x - z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq; apply this; rw [h_eq, neg_zero]
    lt_or_gt_of_ne v_ne |>.casesOn
      (fun h => iff_of_true h (le_of_lt h))
      (fun h => iff_of_false (not_lt_of_gt h) (not_le_of_gt h))

  rw [← card_T] at card_U
  linarith

let σ := linearInvo k
  have h_prime : (4 * k + 1).Prime := (inferInstanceAs (Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime)).out
  have h_z_ne_0 (s : S k) : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun h => by
    have := s.2.1; rw [h] at this; simp at this
    apply_fun (· % 4) at this; norm_num at this
  have h_ne_0 (s : S k) : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun h => by
    have h_sq : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← s.2.1]; have : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := by linarith
      rw [this]; ring
    have : 4 * k + 1 ∣ s.1.1 + s.1.2.1 := h_prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow (by rw [h_sq])
    have : (4 * k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 := Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (Nat.le_of_dvd (by simp; linarith [s.2.2.1]) this) 2
    rw [h_sq] at this
    have : 4 * k + 1 < (4 * k + 1) ^ 2 := Nat.lt_pow_self (by linarith) 2
    linarith
  let half (A : Set (S k)) (hA : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ σ s ∉ A) : 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let f : A ⊕ A ≃ S k := Equiv.ofBijective (fun x => x.elim Subtype.val (σ ∘ Subtype.val))
      (by constructor
          · rintro (a|a) (b|b) h <;> simp at h
            · exact Subtype.ext h
            · apply Subtype.ext; apply Function.Injective.semiconj (linearInvo_sq k) at h; exact h
            · subst h; have := a.2; rw [hA] at this; have := b.2; contradiction
            · subst h; have := b.2; rw [hA] at this; have := a.2; contradiction
          · intro s
            by_cases hs : s ∈ A
            · exact ⟨Sum.inl ⟨s, hs⟩, rfl⟩
            · exact ⟨Sum.inr ⟨σ s, by rwa [hA, not_not]⟩, by simp [linearInvo_sq]⟩)
    rw [← Fintype.card_sum, Fintype.card_congr f, two_mul]
  have hT : ∀ s, s ∈ T k ↔ σ s ∉ T k := fun s => by
    simp [T, σ, linearInvo, S]; have := h_z_ne_0 s; linarith
  have hU : ∀ s, s ∈ U k ↔ σ s ∉ U k := fun s => by
    simp [U, σ, linearInvo, S]; have := h_ne_0 s; linarith
  rw [← mul_left_inj' (two_ne_zero), half (U k) hU, half (T k) hT]

let σ := linearInvo k
  have hσ : σ.Involutive := fun s ↦ congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s
  have h_split (P : S k → Prop) [DecidablePred P] (h_neg : ∀ s, P s ↔ ¬ P (σ s)) :
      2 * Fintype.card {s | P s} = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let A := {s | P s}
    let B := {s | ¬ P s}
    have h_bij : A ≃ B :=
      { toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (h_neg s).mp hs⟩
        invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (h_neg (σ s)).mpr (by rwa [hσ s])⟩
        left_inv := fun s ↦ Subtype.ext (hσ s)
        right_inv := fun s ↦ Subtype.ext (hσ s) }
    rw [←Fintype.card_subtype_or P, Fintype.card_congr h_bij, two_mul]

  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    convert h_split (fun s ↦ s.1.2.2 > 0) (fun s ↦ by
      simp only [linearInvo, Subtype.coe_mk]
      have h_mod : (s.1.2.2 : ZMod 4) ^ 2 = 1 := by
        have := s.2.1
        apply_fun (Int.cast : ℤ → ZMod 4) at this
        simpa [add_comm] using this
      have h_ne : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun h ↦ by simp [h] at h_mod
      constructor <;> intro h <;> linarith) using 2
    ext; simp [T]

  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    convert h_split (fun s ↦ s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 > 0) (fun s ↦ by
      simp only [linearInvo, Subtype.coe_mk]
      have : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := sorry
      constructor <;> intro h <;> linarith) using 2
    ext; simp [U]

  rw [←hT, ←hU]
  simp

let i := linearInvo k
  have hi : ∀ x, i (i x) = x := fun x ↦ by
    have := linearInvo_sq k
    simp_rw [sq, Function.mul_def, Function.one_def] at this
    rw [Function.funext_iff] at this
    exact this x
  
  have h_z_ne_zero : ∀ x : S k, x.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ rfl
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
    have : (4 * x * y) % 4 = (4 * k + 1) % 4 := by rw [h.1]
    simp only [Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_ofNat, mul_assoc,
      Int.mul_emod_right, add_zero, Int.add_emod, Int.mul_emod, zero_add] at this
    contradiction

  have h_boundary : ∀ x : S k, (x.1.1 : ℤ) - x.1.2.1 + x.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ heq
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
    have h_alg : (2 * x + z) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      have : y = x + z := by linarith
      rw [this] at h
      linear_combination h.1
    have : IsSquare (4 * k + 1) := ⟨(2 * x + z).natAbs, by zify; simp [sq, h_alg]⟩
    exact Nat.Prime.not_isSquare Fact.out this

  have h_T_inv : ∀ x, x ∈ T k ↔ i x ∉ T k := by
    intro x
    simp only [T, linearInvo, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Subtype.coe_mk]
    have := h_z_ne_zero x
    linarith

  have h_U_inv : ∀ x, x ∈ U k ↔ i x ∉ U k := by
    intro x
    simp only [U, linearInvo, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Subtype.coe_mk]
    have := h_boundary x
    linarith

  have h_card : ∀ {A : Set (S k)} [Fintype A], (∀ x, x ∈ A ↔ i x ∉ A) → 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    intro A _ hA
    let f : A → (Aᶜ : Set (S k)) := fun ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ ⟨i x, by rwa [Set.mem_compl_iff, ← hA]⟩
    have hf : Function.Bijective f := by
      constructor
      · intro a b hab
        simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, f] at hab
        apply Subtype.ext
        exact hi a.1 ▸ hi b.1 ▸ by rw [hab]
      · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
        use ⟨i y, by rwa [hA, hi]⟩
        simp only [f, Subtype.mk.injEq, hi]
    have : Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (Aᶜ : Set (S k)) := Fintype.card_of_bijective f hf
    rw [← this, two_mul]
    exact (Fintype.card_subtype_compl _).symm

  rw [h_card h_U_inv, h_card h_T_inv]

let σ := linearInvo k
  have σ_sq : ∀ s, σ (σ s) = s := fun s ↦ congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s

  let half_card (P : S k → Prop) [DecidablePred P]
      (hP : ∀ s, P s ↔ ¬ P (σ s)) : 2 * Fintype.card {s | P s} = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let A := {s | P s}
    let B := {s | ¬ P s}
    have h_disj : Disjoint A B := fun _ hA hB ↦ hB hA
    have h_univ : A ∪ B = Set.univ := Set.eq_univ_of_forall (fun s ↦ em (P s))
    have h_bij : Set.BijOn σ A B := ⟨fun s hs ↦ (hP s).mp hs,
      fun _ _ _ _ h ↦ linearInvo_injective k h,
      fun t ht ↦ ⟨σ t, (hP (σ t)).mpr (by rwa [σ_sq] at ht), σ_sq t⟩⟩
    rw [← Set.toFinset_card, ← Set.toFinset_card, ← Finset.card_union_of_disjoint]
    · rw [← Set.toFinset_union, h_univ]; exact (Finset.card_univ (S k)).symm
    · simp [Finset.disjoint_left, h_disj]
    · rw [Fintype.card_congr (Set.BijOn.equiv h_bij)]; ring

  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    convert half_card (fun s ↦ 0 < (s : ℤ × ℤ × ℤ).2.2) ?_ using 2
    · ext; simp [T]
    · intro s
      have : (s : ℤ × ℤ × ℤ).2.2 ≠ 0 := by
        intro h; have := s.2.1; rw [h] at this; simp at this
        have : (4 * k + 1) % 4 = 0 := by rw [this, mul_assoc]; simp
        norm_num at this
      simp [linearInvo]; exact lt_trichotomy _ 0 |>.resolve_right this |>.imp (by linarith) (by linarith) |>.symm

  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    convert half_card (fun s ↦ 0 < (s : ℤ × ℤ × ℤ).1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2) ?_ using 2
    · ext; simp [U]; ring_nf
    · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩
      simp [linearInvo]
      have h_ne : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        have h_sq : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
          have : z = y - x := by linarith
          rw [this] at hS; have := hS.1; ring_nf at this ⊢
          rwa [add_comm, ← Int.natAbs_pow_two] at this
        have h_p : (4 * k + 1).Prime := Fact.out _
        have : 4 * k + 1 ∣ (x + y).natAbs := Nat.Prime.dvd_of_dvd_pow h_p (by rw [h_sq]; exact dvd_pow_self _ (by norm_num))
        obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := this
        rw [hm, Nat.pow_two, mul_assoc] at h_sq
        nth_rw 1 [← mul_one (4*k+1)] at h_sq
        have : (4 * k + 1) * 1 = (4 * k + 1) * (m * m) := h_sq.symm
        have : 1 = m * m := (Nat.mul_eq_mul_left (Nat.Prime.pos h_p) this).mp rfl
        rw [← Nat.pow_two, Nat.pow_eq_one_iff (by norm_num)] at this
        rw [this, mul_one] at hm
        rw [hm, Nat.pow_two] at h_sq
        nth_rw 2 [← mul_one (4*k+1)] at h_sq
        have : 4 * k + 1 = 1 := Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (Nat.Prime.pos h_p) h_sq
        exact Nat.Prime.ne_one h_p this
      rw [← neg_lt_zero, neg_sub, neg_add, neg_sub, ← neg_sub x y]; simp; ring_nf
      exact lt_trichotomy _ 0 |>.resolve_right h_ne |>.imp (by linarith) (by linarith) |>.symm

  linarith

classical
  let σ := linearInvo k
  have half_card : ∀ (P : S k → Prop),
      (∀ s, P s ↔ ¬ P (σ s)) → 2 * Fintype.card {s | P s} = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    intro P hP
    let A := {s | P s}; let B := {s | ¬ P s}
    have : Fintype.card A = Fintype.card B := Fintype.card_congr <|
      Equiv.mk (fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (hP s).mp hs⟩) (fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, (hP (σ s)).mp hs⟩)
      (fun _ ↦ Subtype.eq (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) _)) (fun _ ↦ Subtype.eq (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) _))
    rw [← this, two_mul, ← Fintype.card_sum, Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.sumCompl P)]
  apply mul_left_cancel₀ (two_ne_zero : 2 ≠ 0)
  rw [half_card (fun s => s.1.2.2 > 0), half_card (fun s => let ⟨x, y, z⟩ := s.1; x - y + z > 0)]
  · rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; dsimp [σ, linearInvo]; simp at h ⊢
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      rintro rfl; simp [S] at h; have := h.1
      apply congr_arg (· % 4) at this
      simp [Int.add_emod] at this
    constructor <;> intro <;> linarith
  · rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; dsimp [σ, linearInvo]; simp at h ⊢
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hv; have : z = y - x := eq_sub_of_add_eq' hv
      simp [S] at h; rw [this, ← sq, ← sub_sq, sq] at h
      have : 4 * k + 1 = (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 := by zify [h.1]; rw [h.1]
      have : (x + y).natAbs ∣ 4 * k + 1 := by rw [this]; exact dvd_pow_self _ (by norm_num)
      rw [hk.out.dvd_iff_one_or_self, ← this, mul_self_eq_one_iff, mul_self_eq_self_iff_one_or_zero] at this
      rcases this with (rfl|rfl|rfl)
      · exact Nat.not_prime_one hk.out
      · exact Nat.not_prime_one hk.out
      · exact Nat.not_prime_zero hk.out
    constructor <;> intro <;> linarith

let invol := linearInvo k
  have h_invol_sq : ∀ s, invol (invol s) = s := fun s ↦ by
    apply Subtype.ext; apply Prod.ext; apply Prod.ext <;> simp [invol, linearInvo]

  let is_half (A : Set (S k)) (f : S k → ℤ) :=
    (∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ f s > 0) ∧ (∀ s, f (invol s) = - f s) ∧ (∀ s, f s ≠ 0)

  have half_card : ∀ A f, is_half A f → 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    intro A f ⟨hA, hf_neg, hf_nz⟩
    let p (s : S k) := f s > 0
    have : A = {s | p s} := Set.ext hA
    rw [this]
    let A' := {s : S k | ¬ p s}
    have h_equiv : {s | p s} ≃ A' :=
      { toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨invol s, by
          simp [p, A'] at hs ⊢; rw [hf_neg]; have := hf_nz s; linarith ⟩
        invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨invol s, by
          simp [p, A'] at hs ⊢; rw [hf_neg]; have := hf_nz (invol s); linarith ⟩
        left_inv := fun x ↦ Subtype.ext (h_invol_sq x)
        right_inv := fun x ↦ Subtype.ext (h_invol_sq x) }
    rw [← Fintype.card_congr h_equiv, two_mul, ← Fintype.card_subtype_compl p]

  have h_z_ne_zero (s : S k) : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have eq := s.2.1; simp [h] at eq
    have : (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) % 2 = 0 := by rw [← eq]; norm_num
    have : (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) % 2 = 1 := by rw [add_comm]; norm_num
    rw [this] at *; contradiction

  have h_sq_ne (s : S k) : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have eq : 4 * s.1.1 * s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := s.2.1
    have z_eq : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := by linarith
    rw [z_eq] at eq
    have : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by linear_combination eq
    have : ∃ n : ℕ, n ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := ⟨(s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs, by
      rw [← Int.coe_nat_inj']; push_cast; rw [sq_abs]; exact this⟩
    exact Nat.Prime.not_sq hk.out this

  apply Nat.mul_right_cancel (by decide : 2 ≠ 0)
  rw [half_card (U k) (fun s ↦ s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2) ⟨fun s ↦ Iff.rfl, fun s ↦ by simp [invol, linearInvo]; ring, h_sq_ne⟩,
      half_card (T k) (fun s ↦ s.1.2.2) ⟨fun s ↦ Iff.rfl, fun s ↦ rfl, h_z_ne_zero⟩]

let σ := linearInvo k
  have hσ : ∀ s, σ (σ s) = s := fun s ↦ congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s

  let count_half (φ : S k → ℤ) (h_odd : ∀ s, φ (σ s) = - φ s) (h_nz : ∀ s, φ s ≠ 0) :
      2 * Fintype.card {s : S k | φ s > 0} = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let P := {s : S k | φ s > 0}
    let N := {s : S k | φ s < 0}
    have h_bij : P ≃ N :=
      { toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, by show φ (σ s) < 0; rw [h_odd]; linarith⟩
        invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, by show φ (σ s) > 0; rw [h_odd]; linarith⟩
        left_inv := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ Subtype.ext (hσ s)
        right_inv := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ Subtype.ext (hσ s) }
    have h_compl : N = {s : S k | ¬ φ s > 0} := by
      ext s; simp; exact lt_trichotomy (φ s) 0 |>.resolve_right (h_nz s) |>.symm
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_compl (fun s ↦ φ s > 0), ← h_compl]
    rw [Fintype.card_congr h_bij, two_mul]

  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply count_half (fun s ↦ s.1.2.2)
    · intro s; rfl
    · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ hz
      simp only [S] at h
      rw [hz] at h; simp at h
      apply_fun (· % 4) at h
      norm_num at h

  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply count_half (fun s ↦ s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2)
    · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, _⟩; change y - x + (-z) = - (x - y + z); ring
    · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ hz
      simp only [S] at h
      change x - y + z = 0 at hz
      have : y = x + z := by linarith
      rw [this] at h
      have : (2 * x + z) ^ 2 = (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) := by ring_nf at h ⊢; assumption
      have hp : (4 * k + 1).Prime := hk.out
      have hsq : IsSquare (4 * k + 1) := ⟨(2 * x + z).natAbs, by rw [← Int.natAbs_pow_two, this]; simp⟩
      exact hp.not_isSquare hsq

  rw [hT] at hU
  exact mul_right_cancel₀ (by norm_num) hU

haveI : DecidablePred (· ∈ U k) := Classical.decPred _
  haveI : DecidablePred (· ∈ T k) := Classical.decPred _
  let σ := linearInvo k
  have hσ_inv : σ ∘ σ = id := funext (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k))

  have half_card (P : Set (S k)) [Fintype P] [Fintype {x // x ∉ P}]
      (hP : ∀ s, s ∈ P ↔ σ s ∉ P) : 2 * Fintype.card P = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let Pc := {x // x ∉ P}
    let f : P → Pc := fun ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ ⟨σ x, (hP x).mp hx⟩
    let g : Pc → P := fun ⟨x, hx⟩ ↦ ⟨σ x, (hP (σ x)).mpr hx⟩
    have : Fintype.card P = Fintype.card Pc := Fintype.card_congr
      { toFun := f, invFun := g,
        left_inv := fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (congr_fun hσ_inv _),
        right_inv := fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (congr_fun hσ_inv _) }
    rw [← this, two_mul, ← Fintype.card_sum]
    exact Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.sumCompl (· ∈ P))

  have h_prime : Nat.Prime (4 * k + 1) := Fact.out _
  have h_not_sq : ∀ n : ℤ, n ^ 2 ≠ 4 * k + 1 := fun n hn ↦ by
    norm_cast at hn
    rw [← Int.natAbs_pow_two] at hn
    exact Nat.Prime.not_sq h_prime ⟨n.natAbs, hn.symm⟩

  apply mul_left_cancel₀ (two_ne_zero)
  rw [half_card (U k), half_card (T k)]

  · intro s
    simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo]
    dsimp
    by_cases hz : s.1.2.2 = 0
    · have := s.2.1
      rw [hz, zero_pow two_ne_zero, add_zero] at this
      have : (4 * s.1.1 * s.1.2.1) % 4 = (4 * k + 1) % 4 := by rw [this]
      simp at this
    · constructor
      · intro h; simp; exact lt_of_le_of_ne (not_lt.1 h) hz
      · intro h; simp at h; exact lt_of_le_of_ne (neg_pos.2 h) (Ne.symm hz)

  · intro s
    simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo]
    dsimp
    have val_ne_zero : (s.1.1 - s.1.2.1) + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have z_eq : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := eq_sub_of_add_eq h_eq
      have eq : 4 * s.1.1 * s.1.2.1 + (s.1.2.1 - s.1.1)^2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
        rw [← z_eq]; exact s.2.1
      ring_nf at eq
      rw [add_comm] at eq
      apply h_not_sq (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) eq
    constructor
    · intro h; simp; exact lt_of_le_of_ne (not_lt.1 h) val_ne_zero
    · intro h; simp at h; exact lt_of_le_of_ne (neg_pos.2 h) (Ne.symm val_ne_zero)

have hp : (4 * k + 1).Prime := hk.out

  have hz_ne_0 : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro s h
    have : (s.1.1 : ZMod 4) * (s.1.2.1 : ZMod 4) * 4 + (s.1.2.2 : ZMod 4) ^ 2 = (4 * k + 1 : ZMod 4) := by
      rw [← Nat.cast_one, ← s.2.1]; ring_nf; simp
    simp [h] at this

  have h_ne_0 : ∀ s : S k, (s.1.1 : ℤ) - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro s h
    have : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := by linarith
    have h_sq : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← s.2.1, this]; ring
    have h_le : 2 ≤ s.1.1 + s.1.2.1 := add_le_add s.2.2.1 s.2.2.2
    have : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ∣ 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← h_sq]; exact dvd_pow_self _ (by linarith)
    have : s.1.1 + s.1.2.1 = 4 * k + 1 := (Nat.Prime.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd hp _ this).resolve_left (by linarith)
    rw [this] at h_sq
    have : (4 * k + 1) * (4 * k + 1) = 4 * k + 1 := by norm_cast at h_sq
    have : 4 * k + 1 = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_left (Nat.Prime.ne_zero hp) this
    linarith [hp.one_lt]

  let σ : S k ≃ S k :=
    { toFun := fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ ↦ ⟨⟨x, y, -z⟩, by simp [S] at h ⊢; exact h⟩
      invFun := fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ ↦ ⟨⟨x, y, -z⟩, by simp [S] at h ⊢; exact h⟩
      left_inv := fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (by simp)
      right_inv := fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (by simp) }

  have h_card_T : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let T_c := {s : S k | s ∉ T k}
    have h_bij : T k ≃ T_c :=
      { toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, by
          simp [T, T_c, S] at hs ⊢
          have := hz_ne_0 s
          linarith⟩
        invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, by
          simp [T, T_c, S] at hs ⊢
          have := hz_ne_0 s
          linarith⟩
        left_inv := fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (by simp)
        right_inv := fun _ ↦ Subtype.ext (by simp) }
    rw [← Fintype.card_congr h_bij]
    rw [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, add_comm, two_mul]

  have h_card_U : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    let τ := linearInvo k
    let U_c := {s : S k | s ∉ U k}
    have h_bij : U k ≃ U_c :=
      { toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨τ s, by
          simp [U, U_c, linearInvo] at hs ⊢
          rw [neg_add_eq_sub]
          have := h_ne_0 s
          linarith⟩
        invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨τ s, by
          simp [U, U_c, linearInvo] at hs ⊢
          rw [neg_add_eq_sub]
          have := h_ne_0 s
          linarith⟩
        left_inv := fun ⟨s, _⟩ ↦ Subtype.ext (by rw [linearInvo_sq]; rfl)
        right_inv := fun ⟨s, _⟩ ↦ Subtype.ext (by rw [linearInvo_sq]; rfl) }
    rw [← Fintype.card_congr h_bij]
    rw [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, add_comm, two_mul]
